title: HumanX Mobile Proof Mini App Specification
summary: Implementation completed and verified for the HumanX World Mini App.
next_action: Provide production World credentials, HTTPS hosting, support email, and final PNG assets before World App Store submission.
blockers: World App Store submission still requires real Developer Portal app id, RP id, signing key, production HTTPS URL, support email, and final exported PNG store assets.

verification.notes: Passed pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, and Spectacula lifecycle validation. Format gate skipped because no formatter script is configured. Final vetting skipped because review_policy.final_vetting is off for plain spectacula.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Moved manifest to done after required verification gates passed.
resume_context.notes: Self-review confirmed the app includes MiniKitProvider, IDKit proof flow, backend RP signatures, World verifier forwarding, signal hash enforcement, file-backed proof persistence, public proof pages, same-window X Web Intent navigation, edit-token X URL attachment, store submission documentation, and app icon/content-card source assets.

history.note: Spec completed from GOALS.md and current World/X docs.
Implementation started immediately per user request.
Implementation, verification loop, and spec self-review completed.
